message:
Lazy src_positions, iterative number stripping, simplify object proxy

- buildDocSrcPositions now lazy: only built on first doc_get_src_pos
  call, skipping work on every happy-path and complete_early parse
- Fix iterative number stripping in autocomplete_input: "1.23e-" now
  strips to "1.23" instead of removing entire atom (was producing
  invalid JSON like {"a": })
- Remove dead undefined check in docObjHandler.getOwnPropertyDescriptor
  (JSON cannot produce undefined values)
- Remove unnecessary `as unknown as number` casts on batchPtr
